InvokedBy.description: Specifies the type of message that triggers a bot.

Sets standard messages as the bot trigger.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: AUTO | ALL | MENTIONS | NONE  
Update requires: No interruption

---

LexConfiguration.description: The configuration for an Amazon Lex V2 bot.

RespondsTo.description: Determines whether the Amazon Lex V2 bot responds to all standard messages. Control messages are not supported.
RespondsTo.markdownDescription:
Determines whether the Amazon Lex V2 bot responds to all standard messages. Control messages are not supported.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: STANDARD_MESSAGES  
Update requires: No interruption

LexBotAliasArn.description: The ARN of the Amazon Lex V2 bot's alias.
LexBotAliasArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the Amazon Lex V2 bot's alias.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 15  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^arn:aws:lex:[a-z]{2}-[a-z]+-\d{1}:\d{12}:bot-alias/[A-Z0-9]{10}/[A-Z0-9]{10}$  
Update requires: No interruption

LocaleId.description: Identifies the Amazon Lex V2 bot's language and locale.
LocaleId.markdownDescription:
Identifies the Amazon Lex V2 bot's language and locale.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

WelcomeIntent.description: The name of the welcome intent configured in the Amazon Lex V2 bot.
WelcomeIntent.markdownDescription:
The name of the welcome intent configured in the Amazon Lex V2 bot.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 100  
Pattern: ^([A-Za-z]_?)+$  
Update requires: No interruption

AppInstanceArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the AppInstance.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 5  
Maximum Length: 1600  
Pattern: ^arn:[a-z0-9-\.]{1,63}:[a-z0-9-\.]{0,63}:[a-z0-9-\.]{0,63}:[a-z0-9-\.]{0,63}:[^/].{0,1023}$  
Update requires: Replacement

---

Required: No  
Type: String

Maximum Length: 1600  
Pattern: ^arn:[a-z0-9-\.]{1,63}:[a-z0-9-\.]{0,63}:[a-z0-9-\.]{0,63}:[a-z0-9-\.]{0,63}:[^/].{0,1023}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

---

Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^[\u0009\u000A\u000D\u0020-\u007E\u0085\u00A0-\uD7FF\uE000-\uFFFD\u10000-\u10FFFF]*$  
Update requires: No interruption
